title: eval_result
description: Emitted after a successful evaluation, carrying the result value as a mime bundle. NOT emitted when the eval errors. The suppressed flag mirrors the user's input terminator: false for `;`, true for `$`. Hosts MAY elide rendering of suppressed results but should still record them.

output_label.description: The Maxima output label string Maxima would assign (e.g. "%o7"). Null if no label is available.

suppressed.description: True when the user terminated input with `$' (suppress echo).
